'''fakuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaccinium|vaccinium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaccinium|vaccinium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fakuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækithith|fækithith]] || [[word:fækithij|fækithij]] || [[word:fækithish|fækithish]] || [[word:fækithi|fækithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakukuthuth|fakukuthuth]] || [[word:fakukuthuj|fakukuthuj]] || [[word:fakukuthush|fakukuthush]] || [[word:fakukuthu|fakukuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakuthuth|fakuthuth]] || [[word:fakuthuj|fakuthuj]] || [[word:fakuthush|fakuthush]] || [[word:fakuthu|fakuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakufthuth|fakufthuth]] || [[word:fakufthuj|fakufthuj]] || [[word:fakufthush|fakufthush]] || [[word:fakufthuf|fakufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakuthuthu|fakuthuthu]] || [[word:fakuthuju|fakuthuju]] || [[word:fakuthushu|fakuthushu]] || [[word:fakuthuku|fakuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakuthuth|fakuthuth]] || [[word:fakuthuj|fakuthuj]] || [[word:fakuthush|fakuthush]] || [[word:fakuthu|fakuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakuthuthul|fakuthuthul]] || [[word:fakuthujul|fakuthujul]] || [[word:fakuthushul|fakuthushul]] || [[word:fakuthukul|fakuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakuthuthuthu|fakuthuthuthu]] || [[word:fakuthujuju|fakuthujuju]] || [[word:fakuthushushu|fakuthushushu]] || [[word:fakuthuku|fakuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakuthuthun|fakuthuthun]] || [[word:fakuthujun|fakuthujun]] || [[word:fakuthushun|fakuthushun]] || [[word:fakuthukun|fakuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakuthuthuoro|fakuthuthuoro]] || [[word:fakuthujuoro|fakuthujuoro]] || [[word:fakuthushuoro|fakuthushuoro]] || [[word:fakuthukuoro|fakuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
